title: Bing Yan appointed Executive Director of Abu Dhabi International Arbitration Centre
description: Skadden Counsel Bing Yan has been appointed as the Executive Director of Abu Dhabi International Arbitration Centre.Yan is a 2005 graduate of Wuhan University. She earned her LLM from the University of Pennsylvania in 2010.Yan has over two decades of experience in international arbitration, practising across Shanghai, New York, Singapore, and London.
